description_long: This car store is a rectangular, low-rise commercial building with a flat roof and a modern, minimalist design. The structure features a wide, open facade with large, clear window sections, likely intended to showcase vehicles inside. The exterior is predominantly white with subtle accents of gray and some colored elements, possibly representing signage or branding. The building includes multiple entry points and driveways, as well as a series of parking spaces or display pads in front and along the sides. Several cars are visibly displayed in front of the building, arranged in a neat row, suggesting a showroom function. The overall appearance is clean, functional, and designed to attract attention from passing traffic.
description: A modern, white, low-rise car store with large windows, multiple entry points, and several cars displayed in front. The building has a minimalist, functional design with clear showroom features.
description_view_0: Side view showing the building's length, flat roof, and multiple display pads with cars in front.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entrance, large window sections, and a row of cars displayed directly in front.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with visible parking/display pads, cars, and the building's clean, rectangular form.
description_view_3: Rear view showing service or secondary entrances, fewer display features, and some colored accent elements.
attribute_signage: Minimal signage present, with small colored panels above the main entrance and on the facade, likely representing branding; no large or illuminated signs visible.
attribute_displayed_cars: Five cars are visibly displayed in front of the building, arranged in a row; specific makes and models are not discernible, but colors include red, blue, and gray.
attribute_glass_facade: Large glass window sections on the front facade, spanning nearly the full height and width of the showroom area; framed in a minimalist style.
attribute_showroom_lighting: No visible lighting fixtures are discernible from the exterior views.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern minimalist, characterized by clean lines, flat roof, large glass panels, and a functional layout.
